cases.subject: Http callout failure in Production
cases.summary: Auth provider token exchange failing with 'Content-Length header already present' error. Root cause identified: explicit Content-Length header in UAPAuthPlugin Apex class conflicts with new platform behavior. Fix: remove the header and let Salesforce manage it automatically.

cases.subject: Request for Courtesy Increase – Daily CSV Output Limit (6 GB/day → 14 GB/day)
Physical Delete Execution | BBHUB June Release | June 9-11, 2026
Data Transform failure in PROD
cases.summary: AAM MuleSoft Data Transform in PROD failing when run manually. Owner: Mohit Sharma. Customer followed up twice requesting updates. Actively being reviewed.

cases.subject: Deployment monitoring Request (June 5-6, 2026)
cases.summary: Deployment monitoring for Case Management enhancements. No alerts observed. Awaiting customer confirmation to close.

cases.subject: MFA and Report Export MFA Extension Request
Seek Assistance on How to Resolve Issue with Percent of Apex Used
cases.summary: Apex usage at 98.06%, blocking development for upcoming release. Support requires PROD system admin access for 45min to run internal script. Customer agreed to grant 1-hour access with a live call.

cases.subject: Report component failing validation with non-descriptive error
cases.summary: Physical delete completed on 4 soft-deleted records in Production. Sandbox environments (CICD26PI2, ESIT, PAT) still under investigation — no soft-deleted records found there. Customer granted 1-week access.

cases.subject: Queries related to Hyperforce migration
cases.summary: TD seeking guidance on Hyperforce migration impact: community portal connections, API integrations, SF-to-SF connections with commercial org, connected apps, managed packages. Awaiting Salesforce responses.

cases.subject: Please exempt mfa enablements for 3 months for our US Wealth orgs
cases.summary: Requesting 3-month MFA exemption (until October) for all US Wealth orgs across 4 enforcement areas. Internal architects evaluating PingFed integration.

cases.subject: 90-Day Deferral Request for Salesforce MFA Enforcement - REDS
cases.summary: Requesting 90-day deferral for MFA enforcement. Sandbox enforcement June 2026, production July 2026. Deferral needed for PingFed/Windows Hello rollout.

cases.subject: Datacloud: Real-time Identity Resolution not working across domains
cases.summary: Real-time IDR failing across two domains. Product team investigating race condition on RT IR processing. Workaround: sending all attributes on single event helps.

cases.subject: Extension for MFA Enforcement
cases.summary: MFA extension requested for ~20,000 user org. Solution provided by Salesforce. Targeting phased enablement by end of year.

improvements: TD Asset Management (TDAM): L1 Critical case still open — Http callout failure in Production due to Content-Length header conflict. Root cause identified, fix provided. Awaiting customer implementation.

TD US Commercial (00D300000001G8W): Technical Health critically low at 32/100. Apex usage at 98% blocking development. Hyperforce org routing enablement active. Also has separate L1 Critical MuleSoft API case (473740517) with 'Remotely Closed' errors traced to Evergage LB dropping TCP connections.

TD Business Banking (00Df4000004l6wQ): Overall score 55/100 lowest across all orgs. 5 active cases: BBHUB deployment monitoring TONIGHT (June 11-12), Physical Delete execution completed, MFA extension request, report validation issue.
TD Canada CDP (00DDp000000g3wu): CSV output limit increase request (6→14 GB/day) opened June 10. Real-time IDR race condition still under product team investigation.
TD US CDP (00D8c000008QbQi): Data Transform PROD failure in 'Need More Information' status — awaiting customer response.
TD CPB (00D1I000000oXUy): Overall 58/100 with Technical Health at 43. MFA extension solution provided for ~20K user org.
TD Wealth Canada - SELA (00D41000002likl): Technical Health at 47/100. Deployment monitoring case awaiting closure confirmation.
TD US Wealth (00D4P00000116t0): Customer Expertise critically low at 35/100. Hyperforce migration questions and 3-month MFA exemption requests pending.
TD REDS (00D6A000002zHJ3): 90-day MFA deferral in progress. Sandbox enforcement imminent (June 2026), production July 2026.
MFA Enforcement cross-org theme: Active cases across REDS, CPB, US Wealth, and Business Banking requesting MFA enforcement extensions/deferrals.
